---
id: get-users-on-chain-token-balance
title: "Get user's on-chain token balance"
description: "Reads the user's linked Stellar public key and returns token balance from Horizon/Soroban."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get user's on-chain token balance"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/users/{id}/token-balance"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Reads the user's linked Stellar public key and returns token balance from Horizon/Soroban.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
